scope: category brain for KVDOS app creation
purpose: Planning record for the app_category_registry implementation

evolutions.title: Design Contract
evolutions.outcome: plugin boundary, output contracts, category universe model, active catalog model, readiness matrix model, visibility rules, profile model, compatibility model, routing models, workspace plan model, evidence model, approval gate model, MVP active list, future inactive list, test matrix, risks, and implementation phases
evolutions.dependency_notes: First slice. Lock the architecture before coding.
evolutions.exit_criterion: The design contract is complete and reviewable.

evolutions.title: Plugin Foundation
evolutions.outcome: plugin shell, schemas, loader, validator, registry reader, readiness loader, visibility engine, and basic status command
evolutions.exit_criterion: The plugin loads category files and reports status safely.

evolutions.title: Category Universe + Active Catalog
evolutions.outcome: full category universe storage, active catalog, readiness matrix, and visibility rules with common ready categories shown first
evolutions.exit_criterion: Registry stores the universe and exposes only active ready categories by default.

evolutions.title: Category Profile + Compatibility Engine
evolutions.outcome: selected category profile builder, compatibility engine, profile validator, and deterministic .kabeeri/app_category_profile.yaml
evolutions.exit_criterion: Valid profiles are generated and invalid combinations fail safely.

evolutions.title: Source Intake Router
evolutions.outcome: source classification, source map, confidence model, conflict tracking, and source inventory outputs
evolutions.exit_criterion: Sources are routed and conflicts are recorded, not hidden.

evolutions.title: Category Questionnaire Router
evolutions.outcome: questionnaire packs, missing-detail prioritization, conditional questions, and .kabeeri/questionnaire_profile.yaml
evolutions.exit_criterion: The router asks missing and high-risk questions first.

evolutions.title: Spec + Micro-Docs Contract Resolver
evolutions.outcome: required docs/spec contracts for UI/UX, system design, database, testing, deployment, security, and evidence
evolutions.exit_criterion: The plugin knows exactly which docs are required for the selected profile.

evolutions.title: Roadmap Tracks + Roadmap Order Engine
evolutions.outcome: ordered roadmap tracks, dependency validation, approval gates, and category-specific ordering rules
evolutions.dependency_notes: Depends on acr-003, acr-005, and acr-006.

evolutions.title: Workspace Planner
evolutions.outcome: non-destructive workspace planning, dry-run/apply behavior, category templates, and folder evidence
evolutions.dependency_notes: Depends on acr-003, acr-006, and acr-007.
evolutions.exit_criterion: A category-specific workspace plan is generated safely.

evolutions.title: IDE Integration + Evidence + Tests
evolutions.outcome: Create New App selection flow, evidence outputs, approval gates, docs, tests, and final hardening
evolutions.exit_criterion: The category chooser is production-ready and test-covered.
